title: AutoRot
description: AutoRot is a dashboard for managing and auto-scheduling cardiology MIR resident rotations.

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: fix: measure external-rotation tail from effective_end_date so prórroga residents aren't wrongly flagged

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: fix rotation grid context menu opening off-screen for blocks low in the grid

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: resize name column and add name abbreviations

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: hide programar and editar segmentos view

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: add solver to the interactive table

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Add GitHub Action to keep Streamlit app awake

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Show only recalculated residents by default in scheduler Gantt, with toggle for full cohort

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Add per-segment pin so users can fix rotations across replans

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: treat not-yet-started residents as R0 to unmix them from current R1s

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Relax curriculum hard sums for legacy 2022 cohort

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Soften min residents constraint for Arritmias

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Allow MEDICINA_INTERNA 7th month as a soft preference and let UNIDAD_IC be scheduled from R3 so legacy pre-Nefrología cohorts replanifican without going INFEASIBLE.

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: allow arritmias to divide if necessary

commits.author: Blanca
commits.message: Support standalone cohorts and unify scheduler warnings
